mapper.select: SELECT * FROM coverage_set WHERE coverage_set_id = #{coverageSetId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM coverage_set WHERE scope_key = #{scopeKey} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE coverage_set SET current_commit_id = #{currentCommitId}, current_snapshot_key = #{currentSnapshotKey}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE coverage_set_id = #{coverageSetId}
UPDATE coverage_set SET line_coverage_rate = #{lineCoverageRate}, branch_coverage_rate = #{branchCoverageRate}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE coverage_set_id = #{coverageSetId}
